message:
fix(freeze): fix dispatch_mode variable access for TSC compilation

- Add !self.dispatch_mode check for arg_cache_js usage since block
  functions don't have access to arg_cache_js declared in main function
- Add !self.dispatch_mode check for this_val discard in generateNativePath
- Add special_object with THIS_FUNC (2) and NEW_TARGET (3) to
  scanParameterUsage to detect when this_val is used
- Add !self.dispatch_mode check for _var_ref_list detach calls in
  return opcodes, tail_call_method, and return_async
- Update _locals_jsv accesses to use getLocalsJsvExpr() helper

Reduces TSC compilation errors from 1684 to 0 (compilation in progress).
